red_state.summary: Focused desktop test command compiled and executed. The suite fails only on missing desktop recommended skill status rendering and status-panel pending-confirmation priority; session store additive preservation tests already pass.
failed_tests: WorkflowStatusPanel > renders concise recommended skill status without implying automatic execution
WorkflowStatusPanel > keeps pending confirmation status higher priority when recommended skill status is present
ActiveSession task polling > renders bounded recommended skill evidence without listing unused recommendations

validation_output.command: cd desktop && bun run test -- --run src/components/workflow/WorkflowComponents.test.tsx src/pages/ActiveSession.test.tsx src/stores/sessionStore.test.ts
validation_output.stdout_summary: Ran 85 tests across 3 files: 82 pass, 3 fail. sessionStore.test.ts passed 13/13. Failures are TestingLibrary assertions for missing data-testid="workflow-recommended-skill-status" in WorkflowStatusPanel and ActiveSession, plus missing Waiting for confirmation status when workflow.status is running but pendingConfirmation is true.

concerns: The session store already preserves additive recommendedSkillStatus and recommendedSkillEvidence fields from create and list API responses, so those new RED assertions pass instead of failing.

The desktop shared WorkflowSessionSummary type already includes recommendedSkillStatus, but WorkflowStatusPanelSummary does not yet expose it; tests use scoped future-shape casts and no production type edits were made.
recovery_hints: Extend WorkflowStatusPanelSummary and WorkflowStatusPanel to render a compact recommended skill status strip from workflow.recommendedSkillStatus.

Render bounded active/relevant skill details only: used, relevant-skipped, relevant-unavailable, or otherwise non-available/degraded active phase items; avoid displaying every unused available recommendation.
Ensure the status badge treats pendingConfirmation true as Waiting for confirmation even when lifecycle status is still running.
Keep the recommended skill UI advisory-only: do not add run, execute, install, enable, default gate, plugin-primary, default bundle, auto-exec, or permission-bypass affordances/copy.
Keep session store behavior additive; do not strip unknown recommended skill evidence fields while merging API responses.
